steps.name: Given User is On Amazon login page.
When user enters a valid user email and pwd.
And User is On Amazon home after succesful login.
Then User selects the "babyboy dress 2-3 years" appears from the dropdown list.
Then User redirected to results screen.
And User click on Add to cart button of the product titled "Pyjamas Set".
